description: Bang is the simplest manual trigger object. It emits value.core.bang and does not store a value; value.core.bang itself remains a data kind/message key, not an object.
runtimeBehavior: Clicking the object or receiving a non-set message on in emits one value.core.bang from out. set is accepted silently and does not emit.

ports.description: Accepts control messages. Non-set messages convert to a bang trigger; set is silent.

example.title: Trigger stored messages
example.description: Connect Bang to Message to emit a saved payload on demand.
